English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Department of Human Development records
New York State College of Human Ecology. Department of Human Development
Gesell, Arnold, 1880-1961.
Ceci, Stephen J.
Feldman, Harold, 1917-
Hazen, Cynthia.
Trzcinski, Eileen.
Wethington, Elaine.
New York State College of Home Economics. Department of Child Development and Family Relationships
New York State College of Home Economics. Department of Family Life
New York State College of Human Ecology. Department of Human Development and Family Studies
23-13-1868
12.7 cubic feet. 12.7 cubic feet.
15 megabytes. 15 megabytes.
1937-2008. Data sheets, survey forms, memos, interview material, articles, minutes, review files, memoranda, photographs, correspondence, videocassettes, and audiocassettes. Data sheets from a survey done in a course, "Orientation in Child Development 100"; sheets entitled "Child Preferences of Food," "Description of Early Home," "Important Factors in Early Childhood," "Community Provisions for Child Welfare," "Early Play Materials," "Garment Remembered Most Vividly," and "Books Read." Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 1 ======= 1 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2075385
HD Outstanding Seniors posters
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
College of Human Ecology Staff
Date completed:
20032008
EAD encoding:
Justine C. Rosa, April 2003Philip Bahr, January 2008Daniel W. Young, February 2010
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, November 2018
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
In 1925 the Department of Family Life was organized and in 1945 the name was changed to the Department of Child Development and Family Relationships. In 1969 the name changed to Human Development and Family Studies and during the 1998-1999 year it was shortened to Human Development
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Data sheets from a survey done in a course, "Orientation in Child Development 100"; sheets entitled "Child Preferences of Food," "Description of Early Home," "Important Factors in Early Childhood," "Community Provisions for Child Welfare," "Early Play Materials," "Garment Remembered Most Vividly," and "Books Read."
Survey forms, memos, interview material and articles for a project conducted by Professor Harold Feldman, to study a first baby's effect on his parents' relationship with each other. The project was supported by a grant from the United States Public Health Service.
Includes videos of Steven Ceci on ABC's 20/20 and the McNeil-Lehrer News Hour in 1993 and one by Cynthia Hazen entitled "Relationships in the 90's" the other "Work and Family: Exploring the Issues" by Eileen Trzcinski and Elaine Wethington.
Includes faculty meeting minutes, external review files, department memoranda, colloquia information, photographs, and correspondence.
Includes preschool intelligence tests such as: Stanford-Binet, Rorschach, Illinois test of psycholinguistic abilities, Holtzman inkblot technique and Gesell.
RELATED MATERIAL
Additional material and digital versions can be found online here: http://ecommons.library.cornell.edu/handle/1813/530
SERIES LIST
Series I. Correspondence and Chairman's Files Box 11- Folders: 15-30, Box 4- Folder: 15, Box 20 - Folders: 19-22, Boxes 26-27
Series II. Faculty Meeting Minutes and Memos Box 2, Box 4- Folders: 20-22, Box 9, Box 11- Folders: 1-14, Box 20 - Folders: 11-15
Series III. Projects and Reports; Faculty Annual Reports Box 1, Box 2- Folders: 40-43, Box 7- Folders: 1-9, Box 19, Box 20- Folders: 16-18; Box 24- Folders: 1-50, Box 25- Folders: 1-12, Box 26- Folders: 1,2, Box 27- Folders: 6, 19-23
Series IV. Subject Files Box 3- Folder: 5; Box 4, Folders: 2, 11-12, 14, 16-19, 23-25; Box 5- Folders: 1-6
Series V. Committees Box 4- Folders: 3-10, 13; Box 5- Folders: 7-8; Box 11- Folders: 31-33, Box 26- Folders: 7-8, Box 27- Folders: 26-27
Series VI. Course Material Box 3- Folders: 1-2; Box 6; Box 8; Box 14
Series VII. Dept. Reviews Box 3- Folders: 3-4; Box 10; Box 13
Series VIII. Photographs, Slides Box 4- Folder: 1; Box 12
Series IX. Intelligence Tests Box 15-18
Series X. Colloquia and Symposiums Box 20 - Folders: 1-10
Series XI. Videos, Cassette Tape Recordings, DVDs
Series XII. Extension Material Box 21- Folders: 1-49; Box 22- Folders: 1-8
Series XIII. Programs Box 29- Folders: 4-6
Series XIV. Publications Box 22- Folders: 9-11
Preferred Citation
See also College of Human Ecology records, #23-2-2817. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Cite As:
Department of Human Development records, #23-13-1868. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Related Materials
See also New York State College of Human Ecology Department of Policy Analysis and Management records #23-26-3006
Videotapes. Photographs. Audiotapes. Surveys. Holtzman inkblot technique. Illinois test of psycholinguistic abilities. Rorschach Test. Stanford-Binet Test. Visual perception. Psychological tests for children. Psychology. Intelligence tests. Parent and child -- Study and teaching. Families -- Study and teaching. Human ecology -- Research. Home economics -- Research. Child development -- Research. Cornell University -- : Faculty.
